series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence or forms received by Board expressing dissatisfaction with education or training program and not containing a complaint regarding a license.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until next Board meeting following receipt of the dissatisfaction form, at which the program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by the Board. ; Electronic: Retain until next Board meeting following receipt of the dissatisfaction form, at which the program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by the Board., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
